highlights:
Lead Data Analyst, AI Big Bets | Wfh
...
# Lead Data Analyst, AI Big Bets
...
Welcome to McKesson Corporation, where we are committed to improving the health of patients around the world. We are currently seeking a highly skilled Lead Data Analyst to join our team and help drive our AI Big Bets initiative forward. In this role, you will have the opportunity to make a significant impact by utilizing your expertise in data analysis and artificial intelligence to identify and implement innovative solutions that will enhance our business operations and ultimately, improve patient outcomes. As a Lead Data Analyst, you will work closely with cross-functional teams to drive data-driven decision making and provide valuable insights to support our AI initiatives. To excel in this role, you must have a strong background in data analytics, a passion for AI, and the ability to effectively communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders. Join us in our mission to revolutionize healthcare and make a meaningful difference in the lives of millions. Utilize expertise in data analysis to identify and implement innovative solutions that enhance business operations and improve patient outcomes. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive data-driven decision making and provide valuable insights to support AI initiatives. Lead the AI Big Bets initiative by developing and implementing data analytics strategies. Conduct thorough research and analysis on healthcare data to identify trends and patterns. Utilize artificial intelligence to develop predictive models and algorithms. Communicate complex data findings and technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders in a clear and concise manner. Design and implement data collection and management processes to ensure accuracy and reliability of data. Stay updated on the latest advancements in AI and data analytics and apply them to improve processes and operations. Lead and mentor junior data analysts to enhance their skills and knowledge. Collaborate with IT teams to optimize data infrastructure and ensure data security. Develop and maintain documentation of data analytics processes and procedures. Participate in strategic planning and decision making to support the overall mission of McKesson Corporation. Continuously evaluate and improve data analytics processes to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. Adhere to all company policies and procedures, including those related to data privacy and compliance. Represent McKesson Corporation as a subject matter expert at conferences and industry events. McKesson Corporation is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.
